title: Nemo's Stuff
description: Greeting weary traveller, and welcome to my mod. This piece of trash includes awesome stuff such as new...interesting foods, Chaos emeralds and if you dare, The Greatest Song To Ever Exist in the form of a music disc.
body:
**_GREETINGS, AND WELCOME TO MY MOD !!_**

THIS MOD INCLUDES (from what i can remember)
- Chaos emerald (able to teleport like an ender pearl)
- Sonic Shoes (makes you go really fast when sprinting)
- Dirt steak (yummy, definitely wont explode you as soon as you eat it)
- Repulsor glove (like, from Iron Man)
- Hover boots (makes you fly when you crouch)
- Gun (self explanatory)
- The Aether (sorta)
- Slimeworld (idek what this is)
- Trumpet (plays ballin', dont spam it)
- 10+ Achievments
- AND PROBABLY MORE I CANT REMEMBER

This doesn't include anything _game-changing_ but I just thought it'd be cool to make it.
